apakriyā (von kar, karoti mit apa) f.
1〉 Ablieferung, Abtragung: ṛṇānāmanapa˚  YĀJÑ. 3,234 . Vgl. anapakriyā, apakarman, apākarman.
— 2〉 Verursachung von Schaden  PAÑCAT. III, 26 . = droha  H. 1515 .

results.rendered_html:
apakriyā
1 Hurt, injury, disservice; fault, wrong or faulty deed, misdeed; caturthopāyasādhye tu śatrau sāṃtvamapakriyā  Śi. 2. 54 ;  Ki. 13. 64  fault.
2 Paying or clearing off (debts).
